description_long: This is a square, plush pillow with a soft, fabric exterior featuring a repeating geometric pattern of blue and white zigzag and dashed lines. The pillow appears well-stuffed, giving it a slightly puffy and inviting appearance, with gentle creases and folds along the edges. On one corner, there is a visible black and white circular label with Asian characters and the word 'COTTON' along with '100%' printed, suggesting the material composition. The surface has a matte finish, and the fabric texture is subtly visible, indicating a comfortable and tactilely pleasant surface. The pillow's overall shape is slightly irregular, with the stuffing causing some bulging and asymmetry. The object is isolated with no surrounding context, making it the focal point of the images.
description: A square, plush pillow with a blue and white geometric pattern and a visible cotton label on one corner. The surface is soft, matte, and slightly textured.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full patterned face and the black and white cotton label in the upper left corner.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the pillow's narrow edge and the label protruding at the top, with the pattern converging along the seam.
description_view_2: Back view similar to the front, with the label now in the upper right corner and the geometric pattern fully visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the pillow's narrow edge and the label at the top, with the pattern converging along the seam.
attribute_brand_logo: black and white circular logo with Asian characters and 'COTTON 100%' in the upper corner
attribute_tag_or_label: printed label integrated into the fabric in the upper corner
